text:
On Wed, 22 Jul 2009 10:40:22 UT, Edwin Groothuis wrote
> Maintainer of audio/libtunepimp-old,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/136986 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/136986
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org


Approved.
Sorry for submitting patch not from a maintainer's email.

fluffy@Fluffy.Khv.Ru is my home private mail.
